    have h₃ : Tendsto (fun X : ℝ => ⨍ x in (0)..X, f x) atTop (𝓝 (limUnder atTop (fun X : ℝ => ⨍ x in (0)..X, f x))) := by
      -- This is a direct consequence of the definition of limUnder and the fact that the limit exists

      -- Convert the HasLimitUnder statement to a Tendsto statement
      exact h₄.tendsto
    exact h₃
